messages.body: Thank you for calling CSA Clear Skin Aesthetics! We apologize that we are not able to take your call at this time.  Please feel free to respond to this message with your inquiry and we will be happy to assist you as soon…

Hi Karin, Hope you’re doing well!  It’s been a little while since we last connected, so I just wanted to check in and make sure everything is going smoothly on your end.  Also, With the holiday season coming up, I’m here…
Thank you for calling CSA Caleriscan Esthetics.

Hi Karin,  I hope you're doing well.  I’m Shikha, the Senior Account Manager at Zoca, and I’ll be your primary point of contact moving forward. I’m here to ensure everything is running smoothly and that we’re aligned wit…
